llmSegmentedChunks.chunkText: Services Offered: ● Traditional manicure: $30 AUD ● Traditional pedicure: $40 AUD ● Shellac (semi-permanent) manicure: $40 AUD ● Shellac pedicure: $50 AUD ● Braids: $50 AUD

Availability and Schedule: ● Luisa works Monday to Friday, from 10:00 am to 6:00 pm. ● On weekends, she works by availability only. ● It’s recommended to book at least one week in advance, as her schedule is often fully booked. ● If a client cancels with at least 24 hours’ notice, the deposit can either be refunded or rescheduled for another date.

Payment Methods: ● Cash only at the appointment. ● A 50% deposit is required to confirm a booking, paid via mobile transfer (number is shared privately). ● Deposits are refundable or transferable if changes are made at least 24 hours before the appointment. ● In some rare cases, she may accept Bancolombia transfers if the client doesn't yet have an Australian bank account, but this is not standard.

General Information about Luisa Bernal’s Services (Nail Technician in Melbourne): Luisa offers manicure and pedicure services from her apartment located at 9 Dryburgh Street, West Melbourne, VIC 3003, apartment 111. The building is located right across from North Melbourne train station.
llmSegmentedChunks.categoryName: General Information / Articles: For informative content like blog posts, articles, guides, industry insights, or company news that doesn't fall into other specific business function categories.
